items.caption: A slide from a presentation with a plain white background and a maroon header at the top. the slide contains a list of bullet points in black text, discussing the concept of changing words in writing. the first bullet point states that people's writing styles and the words they use are very distinct. the second bullet point explains that it is generally easy to tell when someone has copied directly from a text. the third bullet point advises against making sure not to plagiarize by paraphrasing or changing the wording. the last bullet point emphasizes that it is not enough to take a couple of words out of a sentence and call it one's own. the text is clear and legible, and the slide appears to be designed for educational or instructional purposes.
